category_sources: source_facts.description says it migrates or backs up IMAP mail accounts; official homepage describes imapsync as an IMAP migration tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official homepage identify the project as imapsync.
docs_sources: Official imapsync homepage has a documentation section linking the README and FAQ directory.
repo_sources: Official imapsync homepage discusses GitHub imapsync release usage; the GitHub repository identifies imapsync.lamiral.info as upstream, but notes it can be a delayed copy.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README/homepage describe IMAP account migration, backup, syncing, and mailbox transfers.
